prestazioni: Engine swap to a Rover 3.9L V8 (engine code: 3.9L Rover V8, derived from Buick 215) with a forged crankshaft (Mahle Motorsport) and forged pistons (JE Pistons, 10.5:1 compression ratio), paired with a custom camshaft (Kent Cams 280° duration, 0.500" lift) for increased torque in off-road conditions.

Forced induction via a Rotrex C38-91 supercharger (8 psi boost) with a custom intercooler setup (Bell Intercoolers, front-mount, 12-row core) and a custom fuel system upgrade (Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU for precise tuning).

Suspension overhaul with Bilstein B8 8112 series front shocks (remote reservoir) and B8 6112 series rear shocks (remote reservoir), paired with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (2" lift) and Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for improved articulation and durability in extreme off-road conditions.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a JE Motorsport Classic Range Rover kit (flared fenders, extended rocker panels, and custom rear quarter panels) with a 3" wider track for aggressive stance and improved wheel clearance.

Full exterior restoration with a custom two-tone paint scheme (Land Rover Santorini Black over Bahama Gold) applied by a specialist using Glasurit 90 Line paint, paired with a clear bra (XPEL Ultimate) for front-end protection.

Retro-modern lighting upgrade with Hella Rallye 4000 headlights (halogen, 130W) and custom LED taillights (Truck-Lite 4" round LED pods) integrated into the rear bumper, along with a custom roof rack (ARB Classic Deluxe) for overlanding functionality.
